patch_title: Patch 6.01 Notes | FINAL FANTASY XIV, The Lodestone

changes: Fixed an issue where execution of Hollow Nozuichi caused the status effects Forked Raiju Ready and Fleeting Raiju Ready to expire.
Adjusted the sound effect of Broil IV.
Corrected action descriptions for Mangetsu and Oka to reflect that Fuko is the combo action instead of Fuga.
Corrected the description for the trait Enhanced Apex Arrow.
Clarified the description for Eukrasia to state its recast timer is unaffected by status effects or gear attributes.
Corrected the description of the status effect Enhanced Flare.

housing.name: Orchestrion Rolls
housing.description: New orchestrion rolls have been added.

glamour.name: Asphodelos Gear
glamour.description: New gear obtainable via tokens from Pandæmonium: Asphodelos.
